fix_summary: Localized seat-type mapping in backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py now classifies A-column seats as window seats for economy and premium_economy cabins while preserving other mappings. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The change is tightly scoped to the targeted helper in backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py, matching the issue localization.
The diff correctly adds A-column as window for economy and premium_economy and leaves other cabin rules unchanged.
Automated test results passed (4/4), indicating the implementation resolves the issue as intended.
